text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser has been out of sorts lately,
so the two of us are visiting a shrine.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Okay then, let's pray.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Dear gods, please allow me to eat lots of
delicious food! I'm in the mood for pudding
today!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Phew. I sure hope my prayer is answered.
choice_data_list: I thought we came here to help you feel better?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Ack! You're right!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Just hold on a sec while I try again!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Dear gods, I'd like to add one more request. I've
been a bit out of sorts lately, so please do
something about that if you'd be so kind!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: That should do it! Now I've just gotta do my best!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hm? What's this?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I got a message from Fuku! She says my lucky
item is pudding today, so she went to buy me
one!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe my prayers were already answered!
The gods sure don't waste any time!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Dear gods, thank you for the pudding! Next, I'd
like some shortcake!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't know if coming here really helped, but
either way, Matikanetannhauser is back to
normal.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh? What's this? No way! There's a pudding on
the ground!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Or I guess I should say an empty pudding
container. Looks like someone just threw it here.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Well, let's find a trash ca—

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Gyaaahhh! SPIDER!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
There's a spider in the container! P-please, just
spare my life!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... Thanks for throwing away that container
for me. You're my hero, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: ...I guess good things don't come that easily.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser is disheartened, and her
condition remains poor.
